text: I don't know how to do this Carla downloading problem.
Let's break it down. How many GB is the whole file?
200 GB. And she downloads 2 GB per minute.
Good! And she got 40% done before restarting. Can you find 40% of 200?
Right. How long did that 80 GB take?
An update took 20 minutes. And she starts over, so she has to download 200 GB again. 200 / 2 = 100 minutes. So 40 + 20 + 100 = 160 minutes!
You got it! 160 is the correct answer.
